plugins.name: domain-teams
plugins.description: Domain-expert team skills (planning / code / design / research / copywriting) with checkpoint-based quality gates.

plugins.name: obsidian
plugins.description: Obsidian vault workflows — daily notes / markdown / bases / diagrams / canvas / vault management — plus an LLM wiki knowledge layer on top. ⚠️ `defuddle` skill needs Claude Code CLI.

plugins.name: philosophers-toolkit
plugins.description: Philosophical thinking frameworks for problem clarification and deeper reasoning.

plugins.name: dev-workflow
plugins.description: Developer-workflow skills — skill authoring + quality scoring + refactoring + tuning, git-backed project memory, structured pre-decision briefings, complexity / proposal critique.

plugins.name: investing-toolkit
plugins.description: Three-layer investing research toolkit — 5 country data fetchers (US/JP/TW/KR/CN), 6 analysis skills (DCF / comps / screener / technical / portfolio / macro), 4 report orchestrators. ⚠️ Claude Code CLI only — Cowork sandbox blocks external data fetches.

plugins.name: copywriting-toolkit
plugins.description: Pipeline-structured copywriting toolkit — 14 specialized skills (intake / ideation / 5 form-specific drafters / voice / ethics / form gate / audit). Grounded in PASONA / Cialdini / FTC + 景品表示法 ethics.

plugins.name: gws-toolkit
plugins.description: Generic Google Workspace toolkit on the official googleworkspace/cli (gws) — drive / docs / slides / sheets / gmail / calendar + setup automation + design knowledge (Minto / SCQA / chart selection). ⚠️ Claude Code CLI only — Cowork sandbox blocks Google API calls.

plugins.name: translation-toolkit
plugins.description: High-quality translation across i18n / docs / ad copy / novel chapters for EN / JA / ZH-TW / ZH-CN. Bundled CC-BY glossary (~10K entries) + 6-gate verification (placeholder / glossary / linter / back-translation / register / untranslatability).

plugins.name: tsundoku
plugins.description: Turn owned-but-unread Kobo e-books into actionable skills — search library, download DRM-free EPUBs, chunk-to-Markdown, distill via RIA-TV++ pipeline into executable skills. ⚠️ Claude Code CLI only — Cowork blocks Kobo auth + EPUB downloads.

plugins.name: four-dx-coach
plugins.description: Multi-scope coach for The 4 Disciplines of Execution — personal / team-leader / team-member scopes; 12 dual-mode skills (coach mode = Socratic dialogue, audit mode = single-artifact synthesis). NOT for enterprise multi-team rollout.

plugins.name: repo-wiki
plugins.description: LLM Wiki pattern for code repos — init scans src/ + recent commits, grow incrementally from changes / conversational context, query in natural language. Knowledge lives in .repo-wiki/ committed alongside code. Zero external deps.

plugins.name: dbt-wiki
plugins.description: Local-only LLM-queryable knowledge base for dbt projects — reads manifest.json + compiled SQL via sqlglot for column-level lineage; queries model structure / lineage / refactor impact / tribal knowledge. No dbt Cloud needed.

plugins.name: deconstruct-toolkit
plugins.description: Reverse-engineer polished artifacts (copy / docs / UI / arguments / products / orgs) — surface design blueprints, frameworks, rhetorical mechanisms, intentional omissions. Cultural-variant lenses for EN / JA / ZH.

plugins.name: systems-thinking-toolkit
plugins.description: Systems-thinking toolkit grounded in Sherwood, *Seeing the Forest for the Trees* (2002) — 7 skills + 1 router: CLD craft / archetypes / overlay / mental-model / lever cascade / executable Python simulator / manager-personality quadrant.

plugins.name: legal-toolkit
plugins.description: In-house legal toolkit for 台灣 SME → 上市櫃 法務 — 7-layer contract review + playbook negotiation + 6 skills (review / draft / incident-response / IRAC issue-spot / research). Path A grounded (current Taiwan in-force law).

plugins.name: collab-toolkit
plugins.description: Read-only office-collab toolkit for non-Google services (Asana / Slack / Notion) over official MCP servers. Locale-independent. Gmail / Google Calendar moved to gws-toolkit. ⚠️ Claude Code CLI only — Cowork sandbox not supported.

plugins.name: code-toolkit
plugins.description: Process-discipline + canon-grounded coding workflow for Claude Code (+ Codex CLI manifest in lock-step). 11 skills + 4 plugin-level subagents enforce TDD / brainstorming / SDD / parallel-dispatch / code review. Grounded in Beck / Martin / Fowler / Feathers / OWASP / 徳丸本.
